notes: 0.3 baseline captured after direct Figma read. Ignored pages with {Ignore} were excluded. Internal support pages checkbox-control, input, and slot were not added to public docs.

2026-05-08 verification audit: re-read Figma 0.3 directly. Tokens (counts, names, alias targets, modes), statuses, FIGMA_LINKS, sidebar coverage, content JSON coverage, release notes (both files), and implementation-ready vs placeholder-only classification all match Figma. Filled in 16 missing figmaNodeId values for components that have canonical component-set nodes in Figma (button left null because 5 sibling component-sets; data-table/text-input/tooltip have no top-level component-set so remain null).

2026-05-12 nav-header deep inspection + sync: figma-component-inspector ran twice against page 5373:972. First pass captured the canonical udc-nav-header set (5684:11340), default variant (5684:11341), variant matrix (Show Search Box BOOLEAN, Show My Work BOOLEAN, Variant=Default), nested-instance graph (logo, title-area, search, mywork-button, account-actions), 12 Figma↔code divergences, and the Title Only=True bare-title variant of the title-area sub-component. Second pass captured the Figma-side rename of the trigger sub-component from _udc-nav-header_bentobutton to _udc-nav-header_title-area (id 5586:8858 preserved). Authoring-error attribution corrected: the "Component set has existing errors" message that previously appeared to come from udc-nav-header actually originates from udc-badge (5794:7948) on the badge page; it propagates only because the My Work pill nests a badge. The canonical udc-nav-header set reads cleanly on every plugin-API surface.
